title: Philammos margusaricus
uses:
Philammos margusaricus is not a known plant species. However, I can provide information on a similar plant called Philammos ( genus of the family of Asteraceae). The Philammos genus contains species which have been used in traditional medicine in various regions. 

Phytochemical analysis of some Philammos species has indicated the presence of various compounds with potential medicinal properties, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. Some Philammos species are reported to have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including gastrointestinal problems, fever, and infections.

In the absence of more specific information on the medicinal uses of the plant 'Philammos margusaricus', the medicinal uses of other species within the Philammos genus can be considered.
